/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/MyApp.dir/src/main.cpp.o -o MyApp  libCBSH2_Library.a libCBS_Library.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_program_options.so.1.83.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_system.so.1.83.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_filesystem.so.1.83.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_atomic.so.1.83.0
